title: UAE arrests man for trespassing, filming in restricted Fujairah areas without permit
summary_full: UAE authorities have arrested an individual for filming in restricted areas without a permit, highlighting a crackdown on unauthorised content creation amid rising regional tensions. This incident underscores strict regulations against capturing sensitive infrastructure or security details, with legal consequences even without proven harmful intent. The clear message is to prioritise permits before filming.
